title: Portfolio CMS & Developer Showcase Platform
description: A premium developer portfolio and Git-based CMS built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. It supports admin workflows, GitHub metadata enrichment, and static export for GitHub Pages.
short_description: A polished Git-based portfolio platform with admin CMS workflows and static export support.

title: Analytics Console
description: A lightweight analytics dashboard concept with modular cards, visual summaries, and responsive layouts for product teams.
short_description: A responsive analytics dashboard concept for product insights and status tracking.
